sEn: We propose a diffusion model for video generation that extends image diffusion, enabling joint training on images and videos, and introduces a conditional sampling technique for spatial-temporal extension.
sZh: 我们提出了一种视频生成扩散模型，它扩展了图像扩散，支持图像和视频联合训练，并引入了一种用于时空扩展的条件采样技术。
absEn: Generating temporally coherent high fidelity video is an important milestone in generative modeling research. We make progress towards this milestone by proposing a diffusion model for video generation that shows very promising initial results. Our model is a natural extension of the standard image diffusion architecture, and it enables jointly training from image and video data, which we find to reduce the variance of minibatch gradients and speed up optimization. To generate long and higher resolution videos we introduce a new conditional sampling technique for spatial and temporal video extension that performs better than previously proposed methods. We present the first results on a large text-conditioned video generation task, as well as state-of-the-art results on established benchmarks for video prediction and unconditional video generation. Supplementary material is available at https://video-diffusion.github.io/
absZh: 生成时间上连贯的高保真视频是生成建模研究中的一个重要里程碑。我们通过提出一种用于视频生成的扩散模型，朝着这一里程碑取得了进展，该模型展示了非常有前景的初步结果。我们的模型是标准图像扩散架构的自然扩展，它支持从图像和视频数据中联合训练，我们发现这可以减少小批量梯度的方差并加速优化。为了生成长时间且分辨率更高的视频，我们引入了一种新的条件采样技术，用于空间和时间视频扩展，其性能优于先前提出的方法。我们首次展示了在大规模文本条件视频生成任务上的结果，以及在视频预测和无条件视频生成的既定基准上达到的最先进结果。补充材料可在 https://video-diffusion.github.io/ 获取。

contrib.en: Proposes a diffusion model for video generation as a natural extension of image diffusion architectures.
contrib.zh: 提出一种视频生成的扩散模型，作为图像扩散架构的自然扩展。

contrib.en: Enables joint training on image and video data, reducing minibatch gradient variance and speeding optimization.
contrib.zh: 支持图像和视频数据的联合训练，降低小批量梯度方差并加速优化。

contrib.en: Introduces reconstruction-guided sampling for spatial and temporal video extension, outperforming prior methods.
contrib.zh: 引入重建引导采样用于空间和时间视频扩展，优于先前方法。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on video prediction and unconditional video generation benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在视频预测和无条件视频生成基准上取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Presents first results on large-scale text-conditioned video generation using diffusion models.
contrib.zh: 首次展示使用扩散模型的大规模文本条件视频生成结果。

contrib.en: Demonstrates benefits of classifier-free guidance and joint image-video training for video diffusion models.
contrib.zh: 展示了无分类器引导和图像-视频联合训练对视频扩散模型的益处。

limits.en: Model trained on fixed number of frames (e.g., 16) and limited spatial resolution.
limits.zh: 模型在固定帧数（如16帧）和有限空间分辨率上训练。

limits.en: Reconstruction guidance relies on Gaussian approximation of conditioning data, which may be inaccurate for large t.
limits.zh: 重建引导依赖于条件数据的高斯近似，在t较大时可能不准确。

limits.en: Evaluation metrics (FVD, FID, IS) may not fully capture temporal coherence or perceptual quality.
limits.zh: 评估指标（FVD、FID、IS）可能无法完全捕捉时间连贯性或感知质量。

limits.en: Text-to-video models inherit biases from training data and may require curation for fair results.
limits.zh: 文本到视频模型继承训练数据的偏差，可能需要筛选以确保公平结果。

limits.en: Models not released due to potential for harmful use, limiting reproducibility and further research.
limits.zh: 模型因潜在有害用途未发布，限制了可重复性和进一步研究。

items.en: Generating temporally coherent high fidelity video is an important milestone in generative modeling research. We make progress towards this milestone by proposing a diffusion model for video generation that shows very promising initial results. Our model is a natural extension of the standard image diffusion architecture, and it enables jointly training from image and video data, which we find to reduce the variance of minibatch gradients and speed up optimization. To generate long and higher resolution videos we introduce a new conditional sampling technique for spatial and temporal video extension that performs better than previously proposed methods. We present the first results on a large text-conditioned video generation task, as well as state-of-the-art results on established benchmarks for video prediction and unconditional video generation. Supplementary material is available at https://video-diffusion.github.io/.
items.zh: 生成时间上连贯的高保真视频是生成建模研究中的一个重要里程碑。我们通过提出一种用于视频生成的扩散模型来朝这一里程碑迈进，该模型展示了非常有前景的初步结果。我们的模型是标准图像扩散架构的自然扩展，它能够联合训练图像和视频数据，我们发现这可以降低小批量梯度的方差并加速优化。为了生成长且分辨率更高的视频，我们引入了一种新的空间和时间视频扩展的条件采样技术，其性能优于先前提出的方法。我们展示了在大规模文本条件视频生成任务上的首批结果，以及在视频预测和无条件视频生成的既定基准上达到的最先进结果。补充材料可在 https://video-diffusion.github.io/ 获取。

items.en: Diffusion models have recently been producing high quality results in image generation and audio generation [e.g. 28, 39, 40, 16, 23, 36, 48, 60, 42, 10, 29], and there is significant interest in validating diffusion models in new data modalities. In this work, we present first results on video generation using diffusion models, for both unconditional and conditional settings.
items.zh: 扩散模型最近在图像生成和音频生成中产生了高质量的结果[例如 28, 39, 40, 16, 23, 36, 48, 60, 42, 10, 29]，并且人们对于在新数据模态中验证扩散模型有着浓厚的兴趣。在这项工作中，我们首次展示了使用扩散模型进行视频生成的结果，包括无条件设置和条件设置。

items.en: We show that high quality videos can be generated using essentially the standard formulation of the Gaussian diffusion model [46], with little modification other than straightforward architectural changes to accommodate video data within the memory constraints of deep learning accelerators. We train models that generate a fixed number of video frames using a 3D U-Net diffusion model architecture, and we enable generating longer videos by applying this model autoregressively using a new method for conditional generation. We additionally show the benefits of joint training on video and image modeling objectives. We test our methods on video prediction and unconditional video generation, where we achieve state-of-the-art sample quality scores, and we also show promising first results on text-conditioned video generation.
items.zh: 我们表明，使用高斯扩散模型[46]的标准公式，除了为适应深度学习加速器的内存限制而对架构进行直接修改以容纳视频数据外，几乎无需其他修改，即可生成高质量视频。我们训练了使用3D U-Net扩散模型架构生成固定数量视频帧的模型，并通过使用一种新的条件生成方法自回归地应用该模型，从而能够生成更长的视频。我们还展示了在视频和图像建模目标上联合训练的好处。我们在视频预测和无条件视频生成上测试了我们的方法，取得了最先进的样本质量分数，并且在文本条件视频生成上展示了有前景的首批结果。

items.en: Our approach to video generation using diffusion models is to use the standard diffusion model formalism described in Section 2 with a neural network architecture suitable for video data. Each of our models is trained to jointly model a fixed number of frames at a fixed spatial resolution. To extend sampling to longer sequences of frames or higher spatial resolutions, we will repurpose our models with a conditioning technique described later in Section 3.1.
items.zh: 我们使用扩散模型进行视频生成的方法是采用第2节中描述的标准扩散模型形式，并采用适合视频数据的神经网络架构。我们的每个模型都经过训练，以联合建模固定数量的帧，具有固定的空间分辨率。为了将采样扩展到更长的帧序列或更高的空间分辨率，我们将使用后面第3.1节中描述的条件技术重新利用我们的模型。

items.en: In prior work on image modeling, the standard architecture for 𝐱^θsubscript^𝐱𝜃\hat{\mathbf{x}}_{\theta} in an image diffusion model is a U-Net [38, 44], which is a neural network architecture constructed as a spatial downsampling pass followed by a spatial upsampling pass with skip connections to the downsampling pass activations. The network is built from layers of 2D convolutional residual blocks, for example in the style of the Wide ResNet [65], and each such convolutional block is followed by a spatial attention block [55, 58, 11]. Conditioning information, such as 𝐜𝐜\mathbf{c} and λtsubscript𝜆𝑡\lambda_{t}, is provided to the network in the form of an embedding vector added into each residual block (we find it helpful for our models to process these embedding vectors using several MLP layers before adding).
items.zh: 在图像建模的先前工作中，图像扩散模型中 𝐱̂_θ 的标准架构是 U-Net[38, 44]，这是一种神经网络架构，由空间下采样通道和随后的空间上采样通道组成，并带有与下采样通道激活的跳跃连接。该网络由2D卷积残差块层构建，例如 Wide ResNet[65] 的风格，每个这样的卷积块后面跟着一个空间注意力块[55, 58, 11]。条件信息，如 𝐜 和 λt，以嵌入向量的形式提供给网络，该向量被添加到每个残差块中（我们发现对于我们的模型，在添加之前使用几个MLP层处理这些嵌入向量是有帮助的）。

items.en: We propose to extend this image diffusion model architecture to video data, given by a block of a fixed number of frames, using a particular type of 3D U-Net [13] that is factorized over space and time. First, we modify the image model architecture by changing each 2D convolution into a space-only 3D convolution, for instance, we change each 3x3 convolution into a 1x3x3 convolution (the first axis indexes video frames, the second and third index the spatial height and width). The attention in each spatial attention block remains as attention over space; i.e., the first axis is treated as a batch axis. Second, after each spatial attention block, we insert a temporal attention block that performs attention over the first axis and treats the spatial axes as batch axes. We use relative position embeddings [45] in each temporal attention block so that the network can distinguish ordering of frames in a way that does not require an absolute notion of video time. We visualize the model architecture in Fig. 1.
items.zh: 我们建议将这种图像扩散模型架构扩展到视频数据，给定一个固定数量帧的块，使用一种特定的3D U-Net[13]，它在空间和时间上进行分解。首先，我们修改图像模型架构，将每个2D卷积改为仅空间的3D卷积，例如，我们将每个3x3卷积改为1x3x3卷积（第一个轴索引视频帧，第二个和第三个索引空间高度和宽度）。每个空间注意力块中的注意力保持为空间上的注意力；即，第一个轴被视为批次轴。其次，在每个空间注意力块之后，我们插入一个时间注意力块，该块在第一个轴上执行注意力，并将空间轴视为批次轴。我们在每个时间注意力块中使用相对位置嵌入[45]，以便网络能够以不需要绝对视频时间概念的方式区分帧的顺序。我们在图1中可视化了模型架构。

items.en: The use of factorized space-time attention is known to be a good choice in video transformers for its computational efficiency [2, 5, 21]. An advantage of our factorized space-time architecture, which is unique to our video generation setting, is that it is particularly straightforward to mask the model to run on independent images rather than a video, simply by removing the attention operation inside each time attention block and fixing the attention matrix to exactly match each key and query vector at each video timestep. The utility of doing so is that it allows us to jointly train the model on both video and image generation. We find in our experiments that this joint training is important for sample quality (Section 4).
items.zh: 使用分解的时空注意力在视频Transformer中因其计算效率而被认为是好的选择[2, 5, 21]。我们的分解时空架构的一个优势，这对于我们的视频生成设置是独特的，是它可以非常直接地屏蔽模型以在独立图像上运行，而不是视频，只需移除每个时间注意力块内的注意力操作，并将注意力矩阵固定为在每个视频时间步精确匹配每个键和查询向量。这样做的效用是允许我们在视频和图像生成上联合训练模型。我们在实验中发现，这种联合训练对于样本质量很重要（第4节）。

full.sec: 3.1 Reconstruction-guided sampling for improved conditional generation
full.secZh: 3.1 基于重建引导采样的条件生成改进

items.en: The videos we consider modeling typically consist of hundreds to thousands of frames, at a frame rate of at least 24 frames per second. To manage the computational requirements of training our models, we only train on a small subset of say 16 frames at a time. However, at test time we can generate longer videos by extending our samples. For example, we could first generate a video 𝐱a∼pθ​(𝐱)similar-tosuperscript𝐱asubscript𝑝𝜃𝐱\mathbf{x}^{\text{a}}\sim p_{\theta}(\mathbf{x}) consisting of 16 frames, and then extend it with a second sample 𝐱b∼pθ​(𝐱b|𝐱a)similar-tosuperscript𝐱bsubscript𝑝𝜃conditionalsuperscript𝐱bsuperscript𝐱a\mathbf{x}^{\text{b}}\sim p_{\theta}(\mathbf{x}^{\text{b}}|\mathbf{x}^{\text{a}}). If 𝐱bsuperscript𝐱b\mathbf{x}^{\text{b}} consists of frames following 𝐱asuperscript𝐱a\mathbf{x}^{\text{a}}, this allows us to autoregressively extend our sampled videos to arbitrary lengths, which we demonstrate in Section 4.3.3. Alternatively, we could choose 𝐱asuperscript𝐱a\mathbf{x}^{\text{a}} to represent a video of lower frame rate, and then define 𝐱bsuperscript𝐱b\mathbf{x}^{\text{b}} to be those frames in between the frames of 𝐱asuperscript𝐱a\mathbf{x}^{\text{a}}. This allows one to then to upsample a video temporally, similar to how [34] generate high resolution images through spatial upsampling.
items.zh: 我们考虑建模的视频通常包含数百到数千帧，帧率至少为每秒24帧。为了管理训练模型的计算需求，我们每次只训练一个小子集，比如16帧。然而，在测试时，我们可以通过扩展样本来生成更长的视频。例如，我们可以首先生成一个由16帧组成的视频 𝐱ᵃ∼p_θ(𝐱)，然后用第二个样本 𝐱ᵇ∼p_θ(𝐱ᵇ|𝐱ᵃ) 扩展它。如果 𝐱ᵇ 由 𝐱ᵃ 之后的帧组成，这允许我们自回归地将采样视频扩展到任意长度，我们在第4.3.3节中展示了这一点。或者，我们可以选择 𝐱ᵃ 表示较低帧率的视频，然后定义 𝐱ᵇ 为 𝐱ᵃ 帧之间的那些帧。这允许我们在时间上对视频进行上采样，类似于[34]通过空间上采样生成高分辨率图像的方式。

items.en: The additional gradient term in this expression can be interpreted as a form of guidance [16, 20] based on the model’s reconstruction of the conditioning data, and we therefore refer to this method as reconstruction-guided sampling, or simply reconstruction guidance. Like with other forms of guidance, we find that choosing a larger weighting factor, wr>1subscript𝑤𝑟1w_{r}>1, tends to improve sample quality. We empirically investigate reconstruction guidance in Section 4.3.3, where we find it to work surprisingly well, especially when combined with predictor-corrector samplers using Langevin diffusion [48].
items.zh: 该表达式中的额外梯度项可以解释为一种基于模型对条件数据重建的引导 [16, 20]，因此我们将此方法称为重建引导采样，或简称为重建引导。与其他形式的引导一样，我们发现选择较大的权重因子 $w_{r}>1$ 往往能提高样本质量。我们在第 4.3.3 节中经验性地研究了重建引导，发现它效果出奇地好，尤其是与使用 Langevin 扩散 [48] 的预测-校正采样器结合时。

items.en: Reconstruction guidance also extends to the case of spatial interpolation (or super-resolution), in which the mean squared error loss is imposed on a downsampled version of the model prediction, and backpropagation is performed through this downsampling. In this setting, we have low resolution ground truth videos 𝐱asuperscript𝐱𝑎\mathbf{x}^{a} (e.g. at the 64x64 spatial resolution), which may be generated from a low resolution model, and we wish to upsample them into high resolution videos (e.g. at the 128x128 spatial resolution) using an unconditional high resolution diffusion model 𝐱^θsubscript^𝐱𝜃\hat{\mathbf{x}}_{\theta}. To accomplish this, we adjust the high resolution model as follows:

Note that it is also possible to simultaneously condition on low resolution videos while autoregressively extending samples at the high resolution using the same reconstruction guidance method. In Fig. 2, we show samples of this approach for extending 16x64x64 low resolution samples at frameskip 4 to 64x128x128 samples at frameskip 1 using a 9x128x128 diffusion model.

items.en: We report our results on video diffusion models for unconditional video generation (Section 4.1), conditional video generation (video prediction) (Section 4.2), and text-conditioned video generation (Section 4.3). We evaluate our models using standard metrics such as FVD [54], FID [19], and IS [43]; details on evaluation are provided below alongside each benchmark. Samples and additional results are provided at https://video-diffusion.github.io/. Architecture hyperparameters, training details, and compute resources are listed in Appendix A.
items.zh: 我们报告了视频扩散模型在无条件视频生成（第 4.1 节）、条件视频生成（视频预测）（第 4.2 节）和文本条件视频生成（第 4.3 节）上的结果。我们使用标准指标如 FVD [54]、FID [19] 和 IS [43] 评估模型；评估细节在每个基准测试中提供。样本和额外结果见 https://video-diffusion.github.io/。架构超参数、训练细节和算力资源列于附录 A。

items.en: To demonstrate our approach on unconditional generation, we use a popular benchmark of Soomro et al. [49] for unconditional modeling of video. The benchmark consists of short clips of people performing one of 101 activities, and was originally collected for the purpose of training action recognition models. We model short segments of 16 frames from this dataset, downsampled to a spatial resolution of 64x64. In Table 1 we present perceptual quality scores for videos generated by our model, and we compare against methods from the literature, finding that our method strongly improves upon the previous state-of-the-art.
items.zh: 为了展示我们的方法在无条件生成上的效果，我们使用 Soomro 等人 [49] 的流行基准测试进行视频的无条件建模。该基准测试包含人们执行 101 种活动的短视频片段，最初是为训练动作识别模型而收集的。我们对该数据集的 16 帧短片段进行建模，下采样到 64x64 空间分辨率。在表 1 中，我们展示了模型生成视频的感知质量分数，并与文献中的方法进行比较，发现我们的方法显著改进了先前的最优结果。

items.en: We use the data loader provided by TensorFlow Datasets [1] without further processing, and we train on all 13,320 videos. Similar to previous methods, we use the C3D network [51]111We use the C3D model as implemented at github.com/pfnet-research/tgan2 [41]. for calculating FID and IS, using 10,000 samples generated from our model. C3D internally resizes input data to the 112x112 spatial resolution, so perceptual scores are approximately comparable even when the data is sampled at a different resolution originally. As discussed by [64], methods in the literature are unfortunately not always consistent in the data preprocessing that is used, which may lead to small differences in reported scores between papers. The Inception Score we calculate for real data (≈60absent60\approx 60) is consistent with that reported by [26], who also report a higher real data Inception score of ≈90absent90\approx 90 for data sampled at the 128x128 resolution, which indicates that our 64x64 model might be at a disadvantage compared to works that generate at a higher resolution. Nevertheless, our model obtains the best perceptual quality metrics that we could find in the literature.
items.zh: 我们使用 TensorFlow Datasets [1] 提供的数据加载器，无需进一步处理，并在所有 13,320 个视频上进行训练。与先前方法类似，我们使用 C3D 网络 [51]¹¹¹我们使用 github.com/pfnet-research/tgan2 [41] 实现的 C3D 模型。计算 FID 和 IS，使用从模型生成的 10,000 个样本。C3D 内部将输入数据调整到 112x112 空间分辨率，因此即使数据最初以不同分辨率采样，感知分数也大致可比。正如 [64] 所讨论的，文献中的方法在数据预处理上并不总是一致，这可能导致论文之间报告的分数存在微小差异。我们为真实数据计算的 Inception Score（≈60）与 [26] 报告的一致，后者还报告了在 128x128 分辨率下采样的真实数据 Inception Score 更高（≈90），这表明我们的 64x64 模型可能比生成更高分辨率的工作处于劣势。尽管如此，我们的模型获得了我们在文献中能找到的最佳感知质量指标。

items.en: A common benchmark task for evaluating generative models of video is video prediction, where the model is given the first frame(s) of a video and is asked to generate the remainder. Models that do well on this conditional generation task are usually trained explicitly for this conditional setting, for example by being autoregressive across frames. Although our models are instead only trained unconditionally, we can adapt them to the video prediction setting by using the guidance method proposed in section 3.1. Here we evaluate this method on two popular video prediction benchmarks, obtaining state-of-the-art results.
items.zh: 评估视频生成模型的一个常见基准任务是视频预测，其中模型被给定视频的第一帧，并被要求生成剩余部分。在此条件生成任务上表现良好的模型通常专门针对这种条件设置进行训练，例如通过跨帧自回归。尽管我们的模型仅以无条件方式训练，但我们可以通过使用第 3.1 节提出的引导方法将其适应于视频预测设置。在这里，我们在两个流行的视频预测基准上评估该方法，获得了最优结果。

items.en: We evaluate video prediction performance on BAIR Robot Pushing [17], a standard benchmark in the video literature consisting of approximately 44000 videos of robot pushing motions at the 64x64 spatial resolution. Methods for this benchmark are conditioned on 1 frame and generate the next 15. Results are listed in Table 3. Following the evaluation protocol of [4] and others, we calculate FVD [54] using the I3D network [8] by comparing 100×256100256100\times 256 model samples against the 256256256 examples in the evaluation set.
items.zh: 我们在 BAIR Robot Pushing [17] 上评估视频预测性能，这是视频文献中的一个标准基准，包含大约 44,000 个机器人推运动作的视频，空间分辨率为 64x64。该基准的方法以 1 帧为条件，生成接下来的 15 帧。结果列于表 3。遵循 [4] 等人的评估协议，我们使用 I3D 网络 [8] 计算 FVD [54]，通过比较 100×256 个模型样本与评估集中的 256 个示例。

items.en: We additionally evaluate video prediction performance on the Kinetics-600 benchmark [27, 9]. Kinetics-600 contains approximately 400 thousand training videos depicting 600 different activities. We train unconditional models on this dataset at the 64×64646464\times 64 resolution and evaluate on 50 thousand randomly sampled videos from the test set, where we condition on a randomly sampled subsequence of 5 frames and generate the next 11 frames. Like previous works, we calculate FVD and Inception Score using the I3D network [8]. See Table 3 for results. In our reported results we sample test videos without replacement, and we use the same randomly selected subsequences for generating model samples and for defining the ground truth, since this results in the lowest bias and variance in the reported FVD metric. However, from personal communication we learned that [33, 14] instead sampled with replacement, and used a different random seed when sampling the ground truth data. We find that this way of evaluating raises the FVD obtained by our model slightly, from 16.216.216.2 to 16.916.916.9. Inception Score is unaffected.
items.zh: 我们还在 Kinetics-600 基准 [27, 9] 上评估了视频预测性能。Kinetics-600 包含约 40 万个训练视频，描绘了 600 种不同的活动。我们在该数据集上以 64×64 分辨率训练无条件模型，并在测试集中随机采样的 5 万个视频上进行评估，其中我们以随机采样的 5 帧子序列为条件，生成接下来的 11 帧。与先前工作一样，我们使用 I3D 网络 [8] 计算 FVD 和 Inception Score。结果见表 3。在我们报告的结果中，我们无放回地采样测试视频，并使用相同的随机选择子序列来生成模型样本和定义真实值，因为这会导致报告的 FVD 指标偏差和方差最小。然而，通过个人交流，我们了解到 [33, 14] 采用有放回采样，并在采样真实数据时使用不同的随机种子。我们发现这种评估方式会使我们的模型获得的 FVD 略有上升，从 16.2 到 16.9。Inception Score 不受影响。

items.en: The remaining experiments reported are on text-conditioned video generation. In this text-conditioned video generation setting, we employ a dataset of 10 million captioned videos, and we condition the diffusion model on captions in the form of BERT-large embeddings [15] processed using attention pooling. We consider two model sizes: a small model for the joint training ablation, and a large model for generating the remaining results (both architectures are described in detail in Appendix A), and we explore the effects of joint video-image training, classifier-free guidance, and our newly proposed reconstruction guidance method for autoregressive extension and simultaneous spatial and temporal super-resolution. We report the following metrics in this section on 4096 samples: the video metric FVD, and the Inception-based image metrics FID and IS measured by averaging activations across frames (FID/IS-avg) and by measuring the first frame only (FID/IS-first). For FID and FVD, we report two numbers which are measured against the training and validation sets, respectively. For IS, we report two numbers which are averaged scores across 1 split and 10 splits of samples, respectively.
items.zh: 其余报告的实验是关于文本条件视频生成的。在此文本条件视频生成设置中，我们使用包含 1000 万个带字幕视频的数据集，并以 BERT-large 嵌入 [15] 形式的字幕为条件，通过注意力池化处理。我们考虑两种模型大小：用于联合训练消融实验的小模型和用于生成其余结果的大模型（两种架构详见附录 A），并探索联合视频-图像训练、无分类器引导以及我们新提出的用于自回归扩展和同时空间与时间超分辨率的重建引导方法的效果。在本节中，我们报告以下指标（基于 4096 个样本）：视频指标 FVD，以及基于 Inception 的图像指标 FID 和 IS，通过平均帧激活（FID/IS-avg）和仅测量第一帧（FID/IS-first）来计算。对于 FID 和 FVD，我们报告两个数字，分别针对训练集和验证集测量。对于 IS，我们报告两个数字，分别是 1 个分割和 10 个分割样本的平均分数。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Text-conditioned video samples from a cascade of two models. First samples are generated from a 16x64x64 frameskip 4 model. Then those samples are treated as ground truth for simultaneous super-resolution and autoregressive extension to 64x128x128 using a 9x128x128 frameskip 1 model. Both models are conditioned on the text prompt. In this figure, the text prompt, low resolution frames, and high resolution frames are visualized in sequence. See Fig. 5 for more samples.
items.capZh: 图 2：来自两个模型级联的文本条件视频样本。首先从 16x64x64 帧间隔 4 的模型生成样本。然后将这些样本视为真实值，使用 9x128x128 帧间隔 1 的模型同时进行超分辨率和自回归扩展到 64x128x128。两个模型都以文本提示为条件。在此图中，文本提示、低分辨率帧和高分辨率帧按顺序可视化。更多样本见图 5。

items.en: As described in Section 3, one of the main advantages of our video architecture is that it allows us to easily train the model jointly on video and image generative modeling objectives. To implement this joint training, we concatenate random independent image frames to the end of each video sampled from the dataset, and we mask the attention in the temporal attention blocks to prevent mixing information across video frames and each individual image frame. We choose these random independent images from random videos within the same dataset; in future work we plan to explore the effect of choosing images from other larger image-only datasets.
items.zh: 如第 3 节所述，我们视频架构的主要优势之一是它允许我们轻松地在视频和图像生成建模目标上联合训练模型。为了实现这种联合训练，我们将随机独立的图像帧连接到从数据集中采样的每个视频的末尾，并在时间注意力块中屏蔽注意力，以防止视频帧和每个独立图像帧之间的信息混合。我们从同一数据集中的随机视频中选择这些随机独立图像；在未来的工作中，我们计划探索从其他更大的纯图像数据集中选择图像的效果。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Example frames from a random selection of videos generated by our 16x64x64 text-conditioned model. Left: unguided samples, right: guided samples using classifier-free guidance.
items.capZh: 图 3：从我们的 16x64x64 文本条件模型生成的随机选择视频的示例帧。左：无引导样本，右：使用无分类器引导的引导样本。

items.en: In Section 3.1 we proposed the reconstruction guidance method for conditional sampling from diffusion models, an improvement over the replacement method of [48]. In Table 6 we present results on generating longer videos using both techniques, and find that our proposed method indeed improves over the replacement method in terms of perceptual quality scores.
items.zh: 在第 3.1 节中，我们提出了用于扩散模型条件采样的重建引导方法，这是对 [48] 替换方法的改进。在表 6 中，我们展示了使用两种技术生成更长视频的结果，发现我们提出的方法在感知质量分数上确实优于替换方法。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Comparing the replacement method (left) vs the reconstruction guidance method (right) for conditioning for block-autoregressive generation of 64 frames from a 16 frame model. Video frames are displayed over time from left to right; each row is an independent sample. The replacement method suffers from a lack of temporal coherence, unlike the reconstruction guidance method.
items.capZh: 图 4：比较替换方法（左）与重建引导方法（右）用于从 16 帧模型块自回归生成 64 帧的条件化。视频帧随时间从左到右显示；每行是一个独立样本。替换方法缺乏时间连贯性，而重建引导方法则没有这个问题。

items.en: Prior work on video generation has usually employed other types of generative models, notably, autoregressive models, VAEs, GANs, and normalizing flows [e.g. 3, 4, 32, 30, 14, 59, 62, 57]. Related work on model classes similar to diffusion models includes [25, 24]. Concurrent work [63] proposes a diffusion-based approach to video generation that uses an image diffusion model to predict each individual frame within a RNN temporal autoregressive model. Our video diffusion model, by contrast, jointly models entire videos (blocks of frames) using a 3D video architecture with interleaved spatial and temporal attention, and we extend to long sequence lengths by filling in frames or autoregressive temporal extension.
items.zh: 先前关于视频生成的工作通常使用其他类型的生成模型，特别是自回归模型、VAE、GAN 和归一化流 [例如 3, 4, 32, 30, 14, 59, 62, 57]。与扩散模型类似模型类别的相关工作包括 [25, 24]。并行工作 [63] 提出了一种基于扩散的视频生成方法，该方法使用图像扩散模型在 RNN 时间自回归模型中预测每个单独帧。相比之下，我们的视频扩散模型使用具有交错空间和时间注意力的 3D 视频架构联合建模整个视频（帧块），并通过填充帧或自回归时间扩展扩展到长序列长度。

items.en: We have introduced diffusion models for video modeling, thus bringing recent advances in generative modeling using diffusion models to the video domain. We have shown that with straightforward extensions of conventional U-Net architectures for 2D image modeling to 3D space-time, with factorized space-time attention blocks, one can learn effective generative models for video data using the standard formulation of the diffusion model. This includes unconditional models, text-conditioned models, and video prediction models.
items.zh: 我们引入了用于视频建模的扩散模型，从而将扩散模型在生成建模方面的最新进展带到了视频领域。我们已经证明，通过将用于 2D 图像建模的传统 U-Net 架构直接扩展到 3D 时空，并使用分解的时空注意力块，可以使用扩散模型的标准公式学习有效的视频数据生成模型。这包括无条件模型、文本条件模型和视频预测模型。

items.en: We have additionally demonstrated the benefits of joint image-video training and classifier-free guidance for video diffusion models on both video and image sample quality metrics, and we also introduced a new reconstruction-guided conditional sampling method that outperforms existing replacement or imputation methods for conditional sampling from unconditionally trained models. Our reconstruction guidance method can generate long sequences using either frame interpolation (or temporal super-resolution) or extrapolation in an auto-regressive fashion, and also can perform spatial super-resolution. We look forward to investigating this method in a wider variety of conditioning settings.
items.zh: 我们还展示了联合图像-视频训练和无分类器引导对视频扩散模型在视频和图像样本质量指标上的好处，并引入了一种新的重建引导条件采样方法，该方法优于现有的替换或插补方法，用于从无条件训练模型进行条件采样。我们的重建引导方法可以通过帧插值（或时间超分辨率）或自回归外推生成长序列，并且还可以执行空间超分辨率。我们期待在更广泛的条件设置中研究这种方法。

items.en: Our goal with this work is to advance research on methods in generative modeling, and our methods have the potential to positively impact creative downstream applications. As with prior work in generative modeling, however, our methods have the potential for causing harmful impact and could enhance malicious or unethical uses of generative models, such as fake content generation, harassment, and misinformation spread, and thus we have decided not to release our models. Like all generative models, our models reflect the biases of their training datasets and thus may require curation to ensure fair results from sampling. In particular, our text-to-video models inherit the challenges faced by prior work on text-to-image models, and our future work will involve auditing for forms of social bias, similar to [6, 7, 50, 12] for image-to-text and image labeling models. We see our work as only a starting point for further investigation on video diffusion models and investigation into their societal implications, and we will aim to explore benchmark evaluations for social and cultural bias in the video generation setting and make the necessary research advances to address them.
items.zh: 我们这项工作的目标是推进生成建模方法的研究，我们的方法有可能对创造性的下游应用产生积极影响。然而，与先前在生成建模方面的工作一样，我们的方法有可能造成有害影响，并可能增强生成模型的恶意或不道德用途，例如虚假内容生成、骚扰和错误信息传播，因此我们决定不发布我们的模型。与所有生成模型一样，我们的模型反映了其训练数据集的偏差，因此可能需要策划以确保采样的公平结果。特别是，我们的文本到视频模型继承了先前文本到图像模型面临的挑战，我们未来的工作将涉及审计社会偏见的形式，类似于 [6, 7, 50, 12] 对图像到文本和图像标注模型的工作。我们将我们的工作视为视频扩散模型及其社会影响进一步研究的起点，并将致力于探索视频生成设置中社会和文化偏见的基准评估，并做出必要的研究进展来解决这些问题。
